title: Analytical Applications of some Oxidizing Agents in the Determination of Mercaptans
author: ASHUTOSH SRIVASTAVA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University of Jabalpur, Jabalpur 

  Manuscript received  23  July  1973;  revised  16  April 1974; accepted  17  April  1974 

 Au accurate direct titrbnetric procedure for the determination of mercaptans has been evolved using various oxidizing agents, viz., iodine monochloride, iodine monobroinide, iodine trichloride in aqueous solution and iodine cyanide in dilute hydrochloric acid. The end point was determined visually using amylose as indicator or potentiometrically. The procedure is accurate to ±0.3%, the precision being   \(\pm\) 0.5%. Effect of foreign substances has also been studied.
